creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/sdl12 neglects to build if devel/directfb is installed.
Furthermore, it seems to be a shame that we do not take the opportunity
to try this support. Therefore, I wrote a simple set of patches to allow
sdl12 to build with directfb support.

	Have in mind that I did not test if the support actually
works. I just got it to compile. Therefore, tests are required.

Fix: Patch Makefile
	Add patch patch-src__video__directfb__SDL_DirectFB_video.c to files

How-To-Repeat: 
n.a.
